user_question: Skin tint lu ya bb cream
bot_answer:
Skin tint aur BB cream dono hi makeup ke liye achhe options hain, lekin inka istemal alag-alag hota hai. 

Skin tint zyada lightweight hota hai aur natural finish deta hai, jo daily wear ke liye perfect hai. Ye aapki skin tone ko enhance karta hai bina heavy coverage ke. 

Dusri taraf, BB cream thoda zyada coverage deti hai aur skin ko moisturize bhi karti hai, isliye ye thodi zyada versatile hoti hai. Agar aapko thoda zyada coverage chahiye ya skin concerns ko hide karna hai, toh BB cream behtar rahegi. 

Aap apne skin type aur coverage ki zarurat ke hisaab se chunav kar sakti hain!
